title: arctostaphylos × intermedia
intro: Arctostaphylos × intermedia, also known as the hybrid bearberry, is a plant species resulting from the cross between Arctostaphylos uva-ursi and Arctostaphylos glauca. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in treating wounds, skin irritations, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos × intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
